definition:
A man living at the time of Exile and Return, first mentioned at Ezr.4.7
Also named: ar.tach.shash.ta (אַרְתַּחְשַׁשְׂתְּא "Artaxerxes" H0783B)
 § Artaxerxes = "I will make the spoiled to boil: I will stir myself (in) winter"
 son and successor of Xerxes as emperor of Persia, 465-424 BC
